canada.title: Pups and the Kitty-tastrophe
canada.summary: Ryder and the PAW Patrol save a lost kitty from the bay, only to watch her create mayhem on land. Marshall finally rescues her from high atop City Hall! The kitty's owner is overjoyed that Ryder and the PAW Patrol returned her precious pet!

japan.title: パウ・パトロールしゅつどう！

canada.title: Pups Save a Train
canada.summary: A rock slide has trapped Katie and Cali on a train on the old trestle bridge! Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to clear the tracks and free the train before more boulders tumble down.

japan.title: マーシャルのちょうせん

canada.title: Pup Pup Boogie
canada.summary: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the train station, before the next train comes. But when Rubble hurts his paw, Ryder has to teach Chase how to use Rubble's digger.

japan.title: フラウンダーごうをすくえ

canada.title: Pups in a Fog
canada.summary: When the bulb in the Adventure Bay lighthouse goes out, Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock and thick fog as they try to fix the light in time to get their good friend Cap'n Turbot back home safely.

japan.title: せんろでききいっぱつ

canada.title: Pups Save the Sea Turtles
canada.summary: Baby sea turtles were hatching at the other side of the road near the beach. They can't get to the beach without crossing the street, there are cars, skateboarders, scooters and all the hungry naughty seagulls around, not to mention Alex's rambunctious antics. Will the PAW Patrol be able to get them across the road without any danger?

japan.title: イースターのたまごをさがせ

canada.title: Pups and the Very Big Baby
canada.summary: A baby whale has beached herself. The PAW Patrol has to rescue her and make sure her mother doesn't get too close. Can they save her and reunite her with her mother?

japan.title: こねこといっしょにおおさわぎ

canada.title: Pups Save the Circus
canada.summary: Ellie, the baby elephant from the Circus train, has escaped and is loose in Adventure Bay! Now Eunice, her mom, is loose and looking for her. Can the PAW Patrol find Ellie and calm Eunice down?

japan.title: ケイティからのSOS（エスオーエス）

canada.title: Pup a Doodle Do
canada.summary: Mayor Goodway's purse chicken, Chickaletta, is on the loose and the PAW Patrol must find her before it's too late for Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta to host Hello, Adventure Bay!.

japan.title: とうだいのあかりをつけろ

canada.title: Pup Pup Goose
canada.summary: Marshall gets a new BFF when a gosling named "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to figure out a way to get Fuzzy to join his flock when they fly south, because he won't leave Marshall!

japan.title: マーシャルとモッフィー

canada.title: Pup Pup and Away
canada.summary: When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the PAW Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

japan.title: ぞうのエリーをさがせ

canada.title: Pups Pit Crew
canada.summary: The PAW Patrol must help Alex fix his super-trike, and teach him the art of patience and taking things slowly. But when Alex goes too fast the PAW Patrol goes on a high speed chase to save Alex.

japan.title: アレックスをとめろ！

canada.title: Pups Fight Fire
canada.summary: Marshall is going to try to break the record for the World's Fastest Fire-Pup. But he accidentally broke his ladder during practice, and now he's not feeling very confident in himself. Can the rest of the PAW Patrol help their droopy pup-pal regain his fiery confidence?

japan.title: ウォーリーをすくえ

canada.title: Pups Save the Bunnies
canada.summary: A bunch of adorable bunnies have come to Farmer Yumi's carrot patch. The PAW Patrol must catch them all and relocate them to a perfect new home. Can the pups help the bunnies and Farmer Yumi?

japan.title: ミラクルラブルさんじょう！

canada.title: Pup-Tacular
canada.summary: While the rest of the PAW Patrol are out to rescue Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta and checking the trucks, Rocky must face his aquaphobia so that Katie can enter him in the Pup-Tacular show. If he doesn't, Katie might have to miss it and wait for the Cat-Tacular, which isn't coming anytime soon.

japan.title: ロボドッグだいぼうそう

canada.title: Pups Save the Bay
canada.summary: There's an oil spill in the bay, and a baby whale swam into the oil. The PAW Patrol must clean up the baby whale and the oil spill before more animals living in Adventure Bay are harmed by it. Can the pups clean it up before any more animals get hurt?

japan.title: くいしんぼうはだれだ

canada.title: Pups Save a Goodway
canada.summary: It's Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandpa Grover Day, and Mayor Goodway has been planning anxiously for today's celebration. She sent the statue of her Great-Great-Great-Great-Grandfather, Grover Goodway to be cleaned. However, on the way back from the cleaner's, the statue fell in Adventure Bay. The PAW Patrol must dive down to the bottom to get the statue.

japan.title: おしゃれコンテストへのみち

canada.title: Pups Get a Rubble
canada.summary: This episode is a flashback story of how Rubble joined the PAW Patrol. Rubble must help Jake when he gets trapped in an avalanche.

japan.title: きれいなうみをまもれ

canada.title: Pups Save A Walrus
canada.summary: The playful walrus, Wally, was performing tricks for Cap'n Turbot, but he eventually gets himself tangled in a fishing net during one of his tricks. The PAW Patrol must rescue him before he drowns.

japan.title: どうぞうはどこ？

canada.title: Pups Save the Treats
canada.summary: On a snow and icy day, Mr. Porter's van ends up sliding on ice. If the ice cracks, it will fall into the bottom of the bay, and inside of the truck has all the pups' treats and food in it! Can Ryder, Zuma, and Chase save the truck before they break the ice?

japan.title: カウボーイだいさくせん

canada.title: Pups Get a Lift
canada.summary: Katie and Cali are stuck on Jake's Mountain. Rubble wants Ryder to pick him but he picks Marshall and Rocky. Rubble becomes sad. Later on, Rubble is chosen to make a staircase to get Katie and Cali down because the hill is too steep for Marshall's truck.

japan.title: アレックス・パトロールしゅつどう！

canada.title: Pups Save a Hoedown
canada.summary: The PAW Patrol are having a great time at the Adventure Bay Hoedown, but trouble starts to brew when Farmer Al's cows get spooked out and are on the loose in Adventure Bay. Can the PAW Patrol get the cows back to safety before they stampede into the hoedown?

japan.title: きえたあかいリュック

canada.title: Pups Save Alex
canada.summary: While Cali is playing with her favorite toy on Farmer Yumi's farm, she gets stuck on the top of the silo, which is not safe. The PAW Patrol must help the frightened cat before she falls, and only Alex has the solution.

japan.title: チェイスのサプライズバースデー！

canada.title: Pups and the Ghost Pirate
canada.summary: A Halloween party turns into a spooky time when there's a ghostly figure roaming around on a ship. Can the PAW Patrol solve the paranormal mystery and save the Halloween party?

japan.title: パウパウサーカスがやってきた

canada.title: Pups Save a School Day
canada.summary: It's Alex's first day of school, but he has lost his backpack! So the PAW Patrol agrees to help him find it. Easier said than done when Alex says that his backpack could be in many places around Adventure Bay, prompting all the pups to be deployed to all corners of the city, not to mention they have limited time before the school bus arrives. Can the PAW Patrol get the backpack before the school bus picks Alex up?

japan.title: ついせき！おさるパトロール

canada.title: Pups Turn on the Lights
canada.summary: It's Chase's birthday and the other pups and Katie are setting up Chase's surprise birthday party at Katie's Clinic. But their hopes for a surprise is on the line when a strong wind breaks the blade of the windmill on the wind turbine, causing a blackout. Can the PAW Patrol get the power back on in time for Chase's surprise birthday party?

japan.title: たすけて！ふうちゃんのママ

canada.title: Pups Save a Pool Day
canada.summary: It's a hot day and the pups head for the water park, but the pool is empty! The water tower that pumps water into the pool is tilted and has a bent pipe. Can the PAW Patrol fill the pool so everyone can enjoy their day?

japan.title: たいへん！プールのみずがない

canada.title: Circus Pupformers
canada.summary: The PAW Patrol, for the first time must all work together to help Eunice and Ellie save the circus when most of the performers are late. Can the PAW Patrol help them?

japan.title: はじめましてラブル！

canada.title: Pups Make a Splash
canada.summary: Cap'n Turbot's boat has crashed into a rock and is sinking! Ryder and the PAW Patrol leap into action. As Ryder and Zuma tow the boat to safety, Rocky and Skye team up to patch it so it stays afloat long enough to get it to the dock. Everyone stays high and dry - except Rocky!

japan.title: がんばれ！うみがめのあかちゃん
はいしゃさんなんてこわくない

canada.title: Pups Save Christmas
canada.summary: Santa's sleigh crashes and breaks in a snowstorm on Christmas Eve, and all of the presents are scattered across Adventure Bay. It's up to the PAW Patrol to fix the sleigh, round up the reindeer, find the presents, find the magic star, and most of all, save Christmas for Adventure Bay.

japan.title: パウ・スカウトでキャンプ！

canada.title: Pups on Ice
canada.summary: The snowy days have returned to Adventure Bay, and the pups decide to go to Jake's mountain to go snowboarding. However, Jake and Alex end up between a "rock and cold place." Can the PAW Patrol rescue them? If they don't hurry, Ryder could fall on them. Will they get Alex up?

japan.title: ドタバタ！ききゅうレース

canada.title: Pups and the Snow Monster
canada.summary: There's a mystery at Jake's mountain, and it's scaring away all the people who came to ski. The PAW Patrol must find out who or what left strange snow tracks. Could it be a Snow Monster? If they don't find what it is, they might have to close the slopes forever!

japan.title: カメさんのおひっこし

canada.title: Pups Save a Super Pup
canada.summary: Rubble pretends to be "Apollo the Super-Pup", a superhero pup on TV who saves the day by himself. But his superhero phase gets him and the train engineer trapped in a tunnel behind a rock slide. Can the PAW Patrol save the train, the conductor, and Rubble?

japan.title: ゆきやまでパウ・レスキュー

canada.title: Pups Save Ryder's Robot
canada.summary: When Ryder's new robot pup goes haywire, the pups must stop it so Ryder can fix it. If they don't hurry, bad things could happen.

japan.title: きゅうしゅつ！クジラのあかちゃん

canada.title: Pups Save a Hoot
canada.summary: The PAW Patrol must save Mama Hootie before the tree she is in falls in the bay. Will the PAW Patrol help save Little Hootie's Mama?

japan.title: アレックスとまめのき

canada.title: Pups Go All Monkey
canada.summary: A monkey named Mandy has escaped the train car that is supposed to be taking her to the jungle. She is now driving Mr. Porter's van around Adventure Bay, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to catch her.

japan.title: タルボットせんちょうの いとこ

canada.title: Pups Save a Toof
canada.summary: Chase's tooth gets loose, but he doesn't want to see the dentist because he is scared. Meanwhile, Alex must visit the dentist, but he's afraid too, so the pups and Ryder help him face his fear by showing him their own fears.

japan.title: モンスターをおえ

canada.title: Pups Save a Bat
canada.summary: A baby bat takes a nap inside of a bell, and the pups try to rescue it without awakening it. The PAW Patrol chase it around Adventure Bay and try to save it.

japan.title: あらしのダンスバトル

canada.title: Pups Save the Easter Egg Hunt
canada.summary: It's Adventure Bay's annual Easter Egg Hunt and the pups are helping Mayor Goodway with the egg decorating. The hunt for a very special egg leads Ryder and the PAW Patrol on an exciting adventure.

japan.title: おやつだいピンチ

canada.title: Pups and the Lighthouse Boogie
canada.summary: Mayor Goodway and Alex take a rowboat out into the bay to get a closer look at a narwhal whale. A storm is approaching though and the rowboat drifts out of control towards the sea. It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue them!

japan.title: ケントをすくえ！

canada.title: Pups Save Ryder
canada.summary: While out on a hike, Ryder discovers that Garbie the goat is stuck on the edge of a cliff! He attempts to rescue Garbie, but gets stranded himself in the process. He calls the pups for help, but Garbie kicks his pup-pad down the cliff side! Now the pups have to save Ryder... all on their own!

japan.title: ゆきやまであそぼう

canada.title: Pups Great Race
canada.summary: It's Adventure Bay Race Day and the pups are about to race each other all across the town to see who is the fastest pup. One other competitor unexpectedly shows up though: Alex in his super trike!

japan.title: パウっとしゅうかくおてつだい

canada.title: Pups Take the Cake
canada.summary: Mr. Porter enters a cake competition and needs Ryder and the pups to help him bake the biggest and tastiest cake. The race is on to get their cake baked and to the competition on time!

japan.title: パウパウ！しょうがいぶつレース

canada.title: Pups and the Beanstalk
canada.summary: In a dream one of the pups has, Alex is a giant and, without meaning any harm, causes it around Adventure Bay, so the PAW Patrol has to keep him busy and get him back up the beanstalk.

japan.title: ゆうれいせんとハロウィン

canada.title: Pups Save the Turbots
canada.summary: Cap'n Turbot needs to get a picture of the rare blue-footed booby bird. His French cousin, Francois Turbot, decides to help but gets caught on a cliff! It's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue him and bring the two cousins together again.

japan.title: パクっと！ケーキコンテスト

canada.title: Pups Save the Camping Trip
canada.summary: Mayor Goodway, Chickaletta, Rocky, and Skye go camping to earn their Pup Scouts badges, but while searching for berry bushes, Chickaletta falls into a cave! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save their feathered friend!

japan.title: まいごのコウモリ

canada.title: Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
canada.summary: Tons of baby turtles are popping up all over the Lookout. Can the PAW Patrol help get them back to their homes before they get hurt?

japan.title: サンタクロースのおてつだい

canada.title: Pups Save an Elephant Family
canada.summary:
The pups go on a safari and wind up reuniting a family of elephants.

A group of rowdy kittens wreak havoc on the town.

japan.title: こおりのうえでだいぼうそう
ふたごのめっちゃかくれんぼ
こぶたと はなびと なつのよる
かぜひきパウ・パトロール

フランソワとまぼろしのしろクジラ
ペンギンとおいかけっこ
トラブルいっぱい！スノーボードレース

canada.title: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
canada.summary: Luke Stars is coming to Adventure Bay! The whole town is looking forward to the pop stars show, especially Rubble and a star struck Mayor Goodway. On the big day, the pups wake up to a mess as a storm has blown the whole town apart, including the stage. The Paw Patrol is busy at work fixing the stage and corralling the eager audience when Luke calls to say the bridge is out. Ryder sends Zuma and Skye to airlift Luke and his equipment from one side of the bridge to safety of Ryder's ATV, then to the stage where he wows the audience, with a little help from Rubble.

japan.title: せんすいかんをとりもどせ！

canada.title: Pups Save an Eagle
canada.summary: While enjoying a hike in the woods, Mayor Goodway's backpack slips down the side of a cliff, with Chickaletta in it! The backpack is perched way out on a limb, with an eagles nest not far away and Mayor Goodway is sure Chickaletta will be the eagles lunch! Ryder calls Chase to winch the backpack and EMT Marshall just in case the chicken falls. No sooner do the pups rescue Chickaletta than they discover the eagle is caught in twine and tied to her own nest. Skye swallows all her fear and rescues the eagle by executing some sneaky maneuvers to get close enough to bite the twine to free the majestic bird. That pups gotta fly!

japan.title: パウパウ！ピザパーティー

canada.title: Pups Bark with Dinosaurs
canada.summary: The Paw Patrol is on a big excavation dig in the jungle with Cap'n Turbot looking for dinosaur fossils when they unearth 3 fossilized eggs. Before they know what's happening the eggs start to hatch and there are three baby pterodactyls running around Adventure Bay! It's all paws on board for this rescue as Ryder sends the pups to catch the dinos. Just as they're doing that Mayor Goodway and Mr. Porter call to report a Utahraptor is destroying Mr. Porters restaurant, and eating everything in sight! And as soon as they get this news, another call comes in, there's a Triceratop on the railway tracks!! Paw Patrol is on a Roll. Rubble befriends and coaxes the baby Triceratop off the tracks and even gets that dino to help rescue one of the baby pterodactyls. As Chase, Skye and Marshall collect the other two hatchlings, Rocky rigs his peanut dispenser to deploy liver sausages luring the hungry Utahraptor home to the jungle. Soon all the prehistoric creatures are back where they should be, just in time for Rubble to wake from his most vivid dream ever.

japan.title: スカイをすくえ！

canada.title: Pup-Fu!
canada.summary: Sensei Yumi is teaching all the pups the ancient art of Pup-Fu. The Paw Patrol and the mischievous kittens from Mayor Humdinger's Kit-tastrophe Crew are both competing for their belts when they come across an ancient scroll that holds all the secrets of the art. Mayor Humdinger steals the scroll and the Paw Patrol is called upon to find and return it to back to Sensei Yumi. It can be dangerous in the wrong hands, so Chase's drone tracks the sneaky Mayor to his secret lair, while Zuma helps them enter by a hidden cave in the water. Super Pup-Fu student Marshall sneaks in quiet as a mouse and together they get the scroll back where it's supposed to be.

japan.title: ロックン・パウライブ
チカレッタがおちちゃった

canada.title: Pups Save a Chicken of the Sea

japan.title: きょうりゅう だいパニック

canada.title: Pups Save the Woof and Roll Show
canada.summary: Luke Stars is coming to Adventure Bay! The whole town is looking forward to the rock star's show, especially Rubble and a star struck Mayor Goodway. On the big day, the pups wake up to a mess as a storm has blown the whole town apart; including the stage. The PAW Patrol is busy at work fixing the stage and corralling the eager audience when Luke calls to say the bridge is out. Ryder sends Zuma and Skye to airlift Luke and his equipment from one side of the bridge to the safety of Ryder's ATV, then to the stage where he wows the audience with a little help from Rubble.

japan.title: ビックリばこのようせい

canada.summary: While enjoying a hike in the woods, Mayor Goodway's backpack slips down the side of a cliff, with Chickaletta in it! The backpack is perched way out on a limb, with an eagle's nest not far away and Mayor Goodway is sure Chickaletta will be the eagle's lunch! Ryder calls Chase to winch the backpack and EMT Marshall just in case the chicken falls. No sooner do the pups rescue Chickaletta than they discover the eagle is caught in twine and tied to her own nest. Skye overcomes her fear and rescues the eagle by executing some sneaky maneuvers to get close enough to bite the twine to free the majestic bird. That pup's gotta fly!

japan.title: フラフラソワソワ つなわたり

canada.summary: The PAW Patrol is on a big excavation dig in the jungle with Cap'n Turbot looking for dinosaur fossils when they unearth 3 fossilized eggs. Before they know what's happening the eggs start to hatch and there are three baby pterodactyls running around Adventure Bay! It's all paws on board for this rescue as Ryder sends the pups to catch the dinos. Just as they're doing that Mayor Goodway and Mr. Porter call to report a Utahraptor is destroying Mr. Porter's restaurant, and eating everything in sight! And as soon as they get this news, another call comes in, there's a Triceratops on the railway tracks!! PAW Patrol is on a roll. Rubble befriends and coaxes the baby Triceratops off the tracks and even gets that dino to help rescue one of the baby pterodactyls. As Chase, Skye and Marshall collect the other two hatchlings, Rocky rigs his peanut dispenser to deploy liver sausages luring the hungry Utahraptor home to the jungle. Soon all the prehistoric creatures are back where they should be, just in time for Rubble to wake from his most vivid dream ever.

canada.title: All Star Pups!
canada.summary: It's monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo's team, until an eagle steals the ball that is.

japan.title: ロボサウルスをとめろ！

canada.title: Pups Save Sports Day
canada.summary: Everest and Skye face the big bird and save the game. The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

japan.title: アドベンチャー・ベイのえいがさい
クマったダニーをすくえ

canada.title: Pups Save a Blimp
canada.summary: Cap'n Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger, who plans to use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom.

japan.title: はっくつ！きょうりゅうのほね

canada.title: Pups Save a Chili Cook-Off
canada.summary: Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the chili cook-off.

japan.title: ピンチ！ペンペンブリッジ

canada.title: Pups Save a Teeny Tiny Penguin
canada.summary: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge.

japan.title: はじめましてラブル！

canada.title: Pups Save the Cat Show
canada.summary: Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck, so the pups must round them up before the Cat Show is ruined.

japan.title: ミャウっととうじょう ミャルガリータ！

canada.title: Mission Paw: Quest for the Crown

japan.title: アレックスのはがぬけた！
ドラゴンとかくれんぼ
フランソワとまぼろしのしろクジラ
ニョロニョロケロケロだいだっそう！
ふたごのめっちゃかくれんぼ

canada.title: Pups Save Jake's Cake
canada.summary: Ryder and the pups must help get a surprise birthday cake up to Jake's cabin.

japan.title: あらしのよるのおとまりかい

canada.title: Pups Save a Wild Ride
canada.summary: The PAW Patrol must come to the rescue when Alex and Daring Danny X snowboard toward Risky Ridge.

japan.title: スカンクのオナラこうげき
